asset.title: L2 Edit
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The animation clearly demonstrates a step-by-step Compare-and-Set (CAS) cell edit workflow with locking, reading, writing, and versioning. It is highly legible and visually polished.

featureClarity.evidence: The step-by-step progression clearly labels locking, reading, and writing with CAS.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the initial state, locking action, read step, write step, and final unlocked state.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed table layout with clear status indicators and progress tracking.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the spreadsheet and agent execution theme of NodeRoom.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Presents a realistic execution trace of an agent interacting with a versioned cell.

legibility.evidence: High contrast text and clear labels make it easy to read at standard sizes.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Demonstrates concurrency control in financial modeling, highly relevant to engineering and finance readers.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the step-by-step logical flow of a CAS operation.

observedEvidence: Table showing financial metrics with version numbers
Value update to '+22.4%' and version bump to 'V2'
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Demonstration of the Compare-and-Set (CAS) protocol ensuring safe, versioned cell edits by agents without clobbering concurrent updates.
